description_for_human: Access Azure DevOps work items, pipelines, repositories, pull requests, test plans, search, and wiki through natural language.
description_for_model: Tools provided by the Microsoft-hosted Azure DevOps MCP server at mcp.dev.azure.com. Supports work item management (create, read, update, link), board and backlog queries, sprint and capacity management, pipeline monitoring and triggering, repository browsing and commit history, pull request review and threading, test plan and test case management, cross-project code and wiki search, and wiki page editing.
